evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Nach Deiner Einarbeitung wirst Du verantwortlich fur zwei Topics und tragst damit entscheidend zu unserem Geschaftserfolg bei
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Ownership and business-impact language appear alongside cost optimization and data model structure work without dominant testing/governance or speed signals, giving a mixed classification.
evidence.domain_risk: Transformation von Rohdaten zur Nutzung im Reporting und der Marketing Automation fur unser Zeitungsgeschaft digital und traditionell
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors affect subscription marketing and reporting decisions for a newspaper/media business without regulatory or financial-reporting consequence.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Als Mitglied des Data Subscription Teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Data Subscription Team with distinct analyst/scientist/engineer roles points to an existing, growing data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Du entwickelst und implementierst eigenstandig Data Pipelines in der Google Cloud Platform und nutzt dbt, SQL, Github und andere Tools
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tools (GCP, dbt, SQL, GitHub) and a concrete team name give hiring-manager-level detail about daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves subscription/marketing automation for the newspaper business, a commercial/GTM-oriented function.
evidence.autonomy_level: wirst Du verantwortlich fur zwei Topics und tragst damit entscheidend zu unserem Geschaftserfolg bei
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Topic ownership and business-impact framing sit alongside close collaboration with the wider team, giving mixed strategic/execution scope.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the posting.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data contracts, or data quality framework language appears anywhere in the JD.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: the JD is framed entirely in ownership, innovation, and delivery terms with no risk register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Du entwickelst und implementierst eigenstandig Data Pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of independently building new data pipelines and maintaining/optimizing the existing data warehouse.
